final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow, featuring the GPT-5.5 launch announcement with Sam Altman as the presenter.

Style/medium: needs a "国内路演" (China domestic roadshow) aesthetic with "GP调性" (general partner / institutional investor tone) — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single landscape slide cover layout, presenter name and title prominently placed, headline centered
Subject: must include GPT-5.5 launch as the central theme, Sam Altman as named presenter
Scene/backdrop: needs a high-tech, institutional-grade backdrop — exact visual treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, authoritative atmosphere suited to institutional fundraising — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction that balances tech-forward with Chinese institutional investor sensibility — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" (large, headline), "奥特曼" (presenter name, secondary), "Sam Altman" (English name, tertiary)
Constraints: must preserve 16:9 slide format, must feel appropriate for a China domestic LP/GP fundraising roadshow context
Avoid: must avoid overly Western Silicon Valley casual aesthetics; must avoid cluttered or consumer-facing design
